title: coelopleurum multisectum f. trichocarpum
intro: Coelopleurum multisectum f. trichocarpum is a plant species used in traditional Chinese medicine, known as a type of flowering plant in the carrot family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In terms of health benefits, Coelopleurum multisectum f. trichocarpum has been traditionally used to treat various conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or capsules for oral consumption, with some preparations also involving the use of the plant's roots and leaves in traditional Chinese medicine.
